job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_title: Service Control Software Engineer for Traction Applications
job_description:
• 🎓 Learning & Training: Take advantage of a wide range of learning opportunities grow, upskill, and move forward in your career.
• You will make good, but considerate use of your colleague’s contacts in case you need additional information to continue the troubleshooting.
• Using already prepared SW and documents you make necessary adaptations and extensions to address the customer needs, while respecting the defined standards and homologation requirementsTesting and troubleshooting software in diverse environments and support our customers during commissioning and homologation on the vehicle.
• Night shifts and weekend work are likely to be needed.
• Coordinating the technical solutions with your peers to maximize re-utilization of SW, minimizing the risk of bugs and accelerating standardization You have a University (Higher education) degree in Control Systems, Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, Computer Science or equivalent.
• You bring a minimum of 4 years of working experience in SW development for closed loop control, signal processing, algorithms, real time programming mechanisms, commissioning.
• You have experience with IEC 61131-3 programming languages (CODESYS) and Matlab Simulink.
• You have experience with communication protocols and field bus (CAN, TRDP, J1939, MVB, …).

• 3+ years of industrial experience in robotics, autonomous systems, systems engineering, applications engineering, technical support engineering, or related fields.
• Strong software engineering and debugging skills in Python, with experience troubleshooting complex software systems.
• Experience working with Linux-based systems and networking fundamentals.
• Experience with ROS/ROS2.
• Strong communication and collaboration skills, with experience working across engineering, project, support, or customer-facing teams.
• Willingness to travel occasionally to customer sites when required.
• 📱 Company Mobile Phone: Stay connected with a corporate phone – no need to mix work and personal calls.
• 🎓 Learning & Training: Take advantage of a wide range of learning opportunities grow, upskill, and move forward in your career.

• Minimum QualificationsBachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
• Strong cross-functional collaboration skills.
• Excellent communication and coordination skills.
• Strong software engineering fundamentals, with flexibility across languages and tools.
• Expert command of Git, including branching models, merge strategies, cherry-pick and conflict resolution, and history analysis across large repository portfolios.
• Understanding of key components of an operating system and low-level build systems (Objective-C, C++).
• Comfortable working across development, QA, and program management teams under deadline pressure and with incomplete information.
• Able to relay critical status and risk information rapidly across distributed teams.
